name: EZPAWN
description_short: At 485 Landa St, New Braunfels, TX 78130, you'll find EZPAWN. Reach them at +1 830-643-1055.
description_long:
EZPAWN is part of a national chain of pawn shops operating across the United States. The Las Vegas location at 1501 E. Charleston Blvd. offers a full suite of pawn services, retail merchandise, and specialty programs designed to give consumers quick access to cash or affordable goods. The store operates seven days a week with extended weekday hours, and this particular location also offers auto loans and firearms services.

The store's core service is collateral-based pawn loans — customers bring items of value, receive a cash loan based on the item's appraised worth, and can reclaim their property by repaying the loan plus fees within the agreed term. Beyond loans, EZPAWN buys gold, diamond jewelry, and broken gold of any karat, and offers firearms appraisal, loans, and outright purchases at select locations including this one. The retail floor stocks pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming gear, musical instruments, handbags, and sneakers at 25–70% below new retail prices, with new inventory arriving daily.

EZPAWN differentiates itself through several digital and loyalty tools not commonly found at independent pawn shops. Its Instant Quote tool lets customers get an estimated value for electronics online before visiting the store. The EZ+ Rewards Program awards points on pawn, redemption, buy, and sell transactions, redeemable through an online portal that also handles pawn extensions and layaway payments. Flexible purchase options include a 10%-down layaway plan and a 'Take Today' buy-now-pay-later partnership with third-party lenders offering terms up to 12+ months, subject to credit approval.

EZPAWN serves a legitimate need for consumers who lack access to traditional credit and need immediate cash against physical assets. However, pawn loans carry fees that translate to high effective APRs, and items not redeemed on time are forfeited. The store is best approached as a short-term cash tool or a bargain retail destination — not as a low-cost borrowing option. Redemption of pawned firearms requires a background check unless exempted by law, which is an important operational caveat for that category.
pros: EZ+ Rewards Program earns points on all pawn, redeem, buy, and sell transactions
Instant Quote tool estimates electronics value online before visiting the store
Layaway available with only 10% down and affordable monthly payments
Take Today buy-now-pay-later option allows up to 12+ months to pay, no upfront full cost
Retail merchandise priced 25–70% below new retail with daily new inventory arrivals
Expert gold buyers purchase gold and diamonds of any karat or condition, including broken pieces
Online pawn account management — extensions and layaway payments handled digitally via EZ+
cons: Pawn loans are subject to fees that can amount to high effective APRs — terms not disclosed online
Items not redeemed within the loan term are permanently forfeited with no further recourse
Take Today payment plans require third-party credit approval and are not guaranteed
Firearms redemption requires a background check, adding a procedural step to reclaiming pawned guns
Not all services (including online payments) are available at all locations; availability varies by state
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash and willing to use personal property as collateral
Bargain shoppers seeking discounted brand-name electronics, jewelry, or tools
Sellers looking to liquidate gold, diamond jewelry, or firearms for cash
Shoppers wanting layaway or flexible payment options on pre-owned merchandise
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best for consumers who need fast cash against physical assets or want deeply discounted pre-owned goods and have no better borrowing options. The main caveat is that pawn loan fees are high relative to traditional credit, and failure to redeem means permanent loss of the pawned item — making this a last-resort cash tool rather than a routine borrowing strategy.
services: Gold and diamond jewelry buying (any karat or condition)
Firearms loans, appraisals, and outright purchases
Auto loans (available at this Las Vegas location)
Pre-owned retail merchandise (electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, musical gear)
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
Take Today buy-now-pay-later financing (up to 12+ months)
EZ+ Rewards Program (points on all eligible transactions)
Product Protection Plan for purchased electronics and audio/video equipment
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, stone replacement, free cleaning)
